name: Chocolate Cream Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate chips over hot water. Let cool for about 10 minutes (any longer and they will stiffen).
2. Whip the cream cheese and salt until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add 1/2 cup brown sugar; cream this thoroughly.
4. Blend in egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Add vanilla extract and chocolate to the mixture and beat thoroughly.
6. Beat egg whites into soft peaks.
7. Gradually add remaining sugar and beat until stiff and glossy.
8. Fold the chocolate mixture into the egg whites.
9. Fold in whipped cream.
10. Spoon the filling into a crust (prepared as directed) and chill overnight.
11. Chocolate Crumb Crust: Combine crumbs, brown sugar, melted chocolate, and butter, blending thoroughly. Pat the mixture onto the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate. Chill before adding the filling.
Enjoy!
